# moikapy.dev

> AI engineer, gamer, 3D printing. Blog about AI engineering, gaming, building cool stuff.

## Paid API

- /api/knowledge?q=... — Search knowledge base ($0.02, x402/USDC on Base)
- /api/posts — List posts ($0.01, x402/USDC on Base, free from own site)
- /api — Full API docs (free)

## Free Content

- /blog — Blog listing
- /blog/{slug} — Individual posts
- /feed/rss.xml — RSS feed
- /SKILL.md — Full agent & API guide

## Payment

x402 protocol. USDC on Base (chain 8453). See /api for details.

## Details

- See /SKILL.md for complete API documentation and integration guide
